creator: morganw@gmail.com
text:
Ah, I noticed your "nehalem" library, and with some tinkering discovered it's a problem with math/openblas being built with DYNAMIC_ARCH. 

[morganw@mercury:~/tmp$]: R

Error in La_library() : LAPACK routines cannot be loaded

In La_library() :
  unable to load shared object '/usr/local/lib/R/modules//lapack.so':
  Shared object "libRlapack.so" not found, required by "lapack.so"
>
